_note: Viator URLs are affiliate-ready — VIATOR_AFFILIATE_PID appended at runtime by _providers.js. To activate: add VIATOR_AFFILIATE_PID env var in Vercel.

listings.name: Sa Being Lae Restaurant
listings.description: Authentic Thai seafood on Lamai Beach. Local favorite, fresh fish, sea view.

listings.name: Imchai Restaurant
listings.description: Beloved local Thai restaurant in Lamai, incredibly fresh ingredients, real home-cooking. Always busy with locals.

listings.name: Thai Kitchen Samui
listings.description: Consistently rated one of Samui's best for authentic Thai food. Tiny, unassuming, perfect.

listings.name: Noo Beer Garden
listings.description: Legendary open-air local beer garden and Thai food spot in Lamai. Cheap, lively, extremely local.

listings.name: Barracuda Restaurant & Bar
listings.description: Mediterranean and seafood with a sea view in Chaweng. Popular with expats and tourists. Great cocktails.

listings.name: The Larder
listings.description: European-style deli and restaurant — proper breakfasts, sandwiches, imported cheeses. Expat institution.

listings.name: Ninja Crepes
listings.description: Famous street food crepes in Lamai — sweet and savory. A backpacker classic, open late.

listings.name: Fisherman's Village Friday Night Market
listings.description: Every Friday evening — walking street transforms into a night market with street food, live music, crafts, and local vendors. Don't miss it.

listings.name: Lamai Night Market
listings.description: Nightly market in central Lamai — pad thai, BBQ, fresh fruit, local snacks. Cheap, authentic, lively.

listings.name: The Shack Bar & Grill
listings.description: Lively sports bar and grill in Chaweng — burgers, ribs, live sports on big screens, craft beers.

listings.name: Anantara Bophut Koh Samui Resort
listings.description: 5-star boutique resort on Bophut Beach. Thai-style villas, exceptional spa, sunset views. Great for couples.

listings.name: W Koh Samui
listings.description: Ultra-design luxury resort on the quiet north shore. Stunning infinity pool, party vibe, world-class service.

listings.name: Six Senses Samui
listings.description: Cliffside eco-luxury resort with private villas perched over the Gulf. Exceptional spa, organic food, unrivalled views.

listings.name: Kamalaya Wellness Sanctuary
listings.description: Award-winning wellness retreat built around a Buddhist monk's cave. Detox, yoga, Ayurveda, burnout recovery. World-class.

listings.name: Samui Paradise Chaweng Beach Resort
listings.description: Mid-range beachfront resort on Chaweng. Good value, great location, large pool. Family-friendly.

listings.name: Hansar Samui Resort
listings.description: Contemporary boutique resort with stunning Bophut bay views, infinity pool, excellent H Bistro restaurant.

listings.name: Centara Reserve Samui
listings.description: Newly repositioned luxury resort in Chaweng with stunning pool terraces, great beach access, multiple restaurants.

listings.name: Discovery Divers Samui
listings.description: Professional PADI dive center in Chaweng. Day trips to Koh Tao, Sail Rock, and Chumphon Pinnacle. Courses from beginner to Divemaster.

listings.name: Aquanauts Samui
listings.description: PADI 5-Star dive center. Full range of courses, guided dives, and multi-day packages to Koh Tao.

listings.name: Ocean Safari Samui
listings.description: Jet ski tours and speedboat adventures around Koh Samui. Popular for island hopping, snorkeling spots, and thrill-seekers.

listings.name: Ang Thong Marine Park Day Tour
listings.description: Full-day speedboat tour to Ang Thong National Marine Park — 42 islands, snorkeling, kayaking, panoramic viewpoint. One of Thailand's best day trips.

listings.name: Koh Tao Snorkeling Day Trip from Samui
listings.description: Speedboat day trip to Koh Tao — snorkeling at multiple reefs, lunch included. Reef sharks, turtles, tropical fish.

listings.name: Koh Tao Scuba Diving Day Trip from Samui
listings.description: 2 boat dives with PADI instructors to Koh Tao. Sail Rock, Chumphon Pinnacle, or local reefs. Equipment included.

listings.name: Sail Rock Diving from Koh Samui
listings.description: Dive Sail Rock — Gulf of Thailand's #1 site. Whale sharks Jul–Sep, massive baitballs, chimney swim-through. 2 dives.

listings.name: Samui Elephant Sanctuary
listings.description: Ethical elephant experience — feed, walk with, and bathe rescued elephants. No riding. Deeply moving.

listings.name: ATV Jungle Tour Koh Samui
listings.description: Off-road ATV through jungle, rubber plantations, mud trails. No license needed. Fun for all levels.

listings.name: Thai Cooking Class Koh Samui
listings.description: Market visit + hands-on cooking class — learn to make pad thai, green curry, mango sticky rice. You eat everything.

listings.name: Samui Sunset Dinner Cruise
listings.description: Catamaran cruise at sunset — dinner, open bar, snorkeling stop. Best romantic evening on the island.

listings.name: Muay Thai Training Koh Samui
listings.description: Train with real fighters at an authentic gym. Pad work, technique, conditioning. Beginner-friendly morning or afternoon class.

listings.name: Zipline Canopy Adventure Koh Samui
listings.description: Fly through jungle canopy on high-speed ziplines. Multiple platforms, tropical forest, guides included.

listings.name: Koh Phangan Day Trip from Samui
listings.description: Full Moon Party island, 30 min by ferry. Explore Had Rin beach, Thong Sala town, jungle waterfalls.

listings.name: Namuang Safari Park Koh Samui
listings.description: Family park in Samui's interior — shows, zip line, ATV, Namuang waterfalls nearby.

listings.name: Tamarind Springs Forest Spa
listings.description: Stunning outdoor spa built into natural boulders in the Samui jungle. Steam caves, cold plunge, herbal treatments. Unique experience.

listings.name: Kamalaya Wellness Sanctuary Spa
listings.description: World-ranked wellness resort and spa. Yoga, Ayurveda, detox programs, traditional Thai massage, meditation. Built around a Buddhist cave.

listings.name: The Spa Samui
listings.description: Award-winning day spa with pool. Thai massage, body wraps, facials, detox programs. Beautiful setting near Bophut.

listings.name: Health Oasis Resort
listings.description: Detox and fasting retreat near Bophut. Juice fasting, colonic, yoga, Ayurveda. Popular with health-conscious travelers.

listings.name: Fisherman's Village Bophut
listings.description: Charming Chinese-style walking street. Boutique shops, galleries, restaurants, Friday night market.

listings.name: Wat Plai Laem
listings.description: Stunning Buddhist temple with 18-armed Guanyin goddess over the water. Free, best in morning.

listings.name: Big Buddha Temple (Wat Phra Yai)
listings.description: Samui's most iconic landmark — 12m golden Buddha overlooking the sea. Free to visit, must-see.

listings.name: Hin Ta Hin Yai (Grandmother/Grandfather Rocks)
listings.description: Naturally shaped rocks of legendary local fame — a quirky, funny stop at the south end of Lamai Beach. Free.

listings.name: Na Muang Waterfall
listings.description: Two waterfalls in the jungle interior of Samui. Namuang 1 is easy access, Namuang 2 requires a short hike. Refreshing swim at the base.

listings.name: Samui Airport Taxi / Transfer
listings.description: Private airport transfer from Samui Airport (USM) to any hotel. Book in advance to avoid touts. Green taxis are official.

listings.name: Lomprayah Ferry Koh Tao / Koh Phangan
listings.description: High-speed catamaran — Samui to Koh Phangan (30 min, 400–600 THB), Koh Tao (1h30, 700–1,000 THB). Departs Nathon or Maenam pier.
